channel.title: AI Morning Brief
channel.description: Your daily AI news briefing. Alex and Sara break down the latest updates on ChatGPT, Claude, image generation AI, and trending AI tools and services every morning.
channel.itunes:author: Believe

item.title: AI News - April 10, 2026
item.description: Today's topics: • Project Glasswing: Securing critical software for the AI era - Anthropic • $LINK and $PIPPIN Outshine AI Agent Projects by Social Activity - Cryptonews.net • Nvidia’s AI grid and the telco dilemma - RCR Wireless News • AI agent credentials live in the same box as untrusted code. Two new architectures show where the blast radius actually stops. - VentureBeat • Anthropic’s Glasswing Highlights AI’s Security Paradox - AI Business • Microsoft Predicts AI Agents Will Buy Software Licenses - Let's Data Science • Bank of Canada, Major Lenders Meet on Anthropic AI Cyber Risk - Bloomberg.com
